---
title: "Economy & Affordability"
title-block-banner: "#C2972F"
title-block-banner-color: "#17324D"
body-classes: area-economy
---

How fast the economy is growing, what it costs to live and borrow, and whether incomes are keeping up — Canada measured against a broad group of 17 OECD peers.

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-economy width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-economy.svg){.area-banner}

### [Growth & Jobs](index.qmd)
GDP and GDP per capita, productivity, employment and unemployment, business
investment, trade, and the dollar.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-economy width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-economy.svg){.area-banner}

### [Cost of Living](cost-of-living.qmd)
Inflation against the Bank of Canada's target, what's driving it, and the
minimum wage in nominal and real terms.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-economy width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-economy.svg){.area-banner}

### [Borrowing Costs](borrowing-costs.qmd)
The policy rate over the long run, mortgage rates, and government bond yields by
term.
:::

::::

::::{.columns}

:::{.column .area-card .area-economy width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-economy.svg){.area-banner}

### [Housing](../housing/index.qmd)
House prices, the gap between prices and incomes, rent, starts and vacancy, and
household debt — with affordability mapped by city and neighbourhood.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column .area-card .area-economy width="32%"}
![](../visual_assets/brand/motifs/banner-economy.svg){.area-banner}

### [Income & Inequality](../income/index.qmd)
Wages and incomes, the Gini coefficient and redistribution, poverty, and the
income distribution over time.
:::

:::{.column width="2%"}
:::

:::{.column width="32%"}
:::

::::
